name: create-jibeos
description: Scaffold a new JibeOS project with standard markdown files

scripts.test: node bin/jibeos.js test-project && echo 'new-project mode: pass' && rm -rf test-project && mkdir -p _here_test && cd _here_test && node ../bin/jibeos.js --here && node ../bin/jibeos.js --here && cd .. && rm -rf _here_test && echo '--here mode: pass'
